name: lvl-restart-specific
description: Level 2 has lvlRestart=1 (restart only when level 0 is used). Level 1 appearing does NOT reset level 2's counter.
expected_behavior: Sequence: 1. / a) / b) / i) / ii) / c) / iii) / iv) / 2. / a) / i). Level 2 continues through iii) and iv) after level 1 'c)' because lvlRestart=1 means only level 0 triggers restart.
